metadata.name: Creative Hobbies and Activities
metadata.description: Engagement in creative hobbies (music, art, crafts, writing, gardening) is associated with significantly reduced mortality through cognitive stimulation, social engagement, and sense of purpose.

sources.citation: Fancourt D, Steptoe A. Hobby engagement and all-cause and cause-specific mortality risk among people aged 50 years and older in 19 countries. Journal of Global Health. 2025;15:04181.

metadata.mechanismOfAction: Cognitive stimulation and neuroplasticity, social engagement, stress reduction, sense of purpose and achievement, improved mental health

applicability.notes: Based on longitudinal study of 79,030 adults aged 50+ across 19 countries with 8-year follow-up.
